summary.intent: User wanted to integrate the contextplus MCP server to help Claude understand the opn_fang codebase structure at the start of every session, addressing context rot concerns.
summary.outcome: Successfully configured contextplus as a project-level MCP server with `.mcp.json`, pulled the required `nomic-embed-text` Ollama model, updated CLAUDE.md with session-start instructions, and added `.contextplus/` to .gitignore.

repo: The opn_fang project has 14 crates that can benefit from semantic search
Project already has a solid memory system (MEMORY.md, topic files, CLAUDE.md) for fighting context rot
workflow: MCP servers defined in `.mcp.json` are only loaded at Claude Code session startup, not mid-session
Project-level `.mcp.json` files only apply when Claude Code is launched from that directory
contextplus requires both Ollama running (`ollama serve`) and the `nomic-embed-text` embedding model
First run of contextplus will be slower as it builds the embedding index
Session-start instructions in CLAUDE.md should call `get_context_tree` to load codebase structure upfront

friction: Confusion when testing in a different session that was launched from home directory instead of project directory
Hook errors (`spark-hook.sh`) firing on every tool call causing noise in output
contextplus is a young project (134 stars, single maintainer, no license specified) with unclear maturity
open_items: Need to restart Claude Code session from project directory to activate the new MCP server
May want to investigate and fix the `spark-hook.sh` hook errors
Ollama must be running before each session for contextplus to work
